title: clerodendrum parvitubulatum
intro: Clerodendrum parvitubulatum, also known as the dwarf starburst or dwarf glorybower, is a flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum parvitulatum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin infections and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
